requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / Performance — Energy Programmes (no EU-style mandatory Ecodesign)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效/性能——能效计划（无欧盟式强制生态设计）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效/性能——能效計劃（無歐盟式強制生態設計）

summary.en: Cambodia does not operate an EU-style mandatory Ecodesign efficacy regulation (no direct counterpart to Regulation (EU) 2019/2020) that sets a binding minimum luminous efficacy (lm/W), colour-rendering, lifetime, or power-factor floor as a market-access gate for LED lamps. Instead, energy performance is addressed through Cambodian energy programmes and efficiency initiatives (driven by the energy authorities and supported by ASEAN harmonisation efforts such as ASEAN SHINE for lighting), which may set voluntary or programme-based minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and product registration for specific lamp categories. Performance is otherwise governed by the CS / IEC performance standards ISC adopts (e.g. IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamp performance) and by buyer specifications. The honest mapping: the EU 'Ecodesign' lane corresponds to these energy programmes, not to a binding national efficacy floor.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨不实行欧盟式强制生态设计能效法规（无与法规（EU）2019/2020 直接对应者），即不以约束性最低光效（lm/W）、显色性、寿命或功率因数下限作为 LED 灯的市场准入关卡。能效性能通过柬埔寨能效计划与效率倡议（由能源主管部门推动，并得到 ASEAN SHINE 照明等 ASEAN 协调努力支持）处理，可能针对特定灯类别设定自愿或基于计划的最低能效标准（MEPS）及产品登记。性能在其他方面由 ISC 采用的 CS / IEC 性能标准（如自镇流 LED 灯性能用 IEC 62612）及买方规范管理。据实映射：欧盟 ＂生态设计＂ 通道对应这些能效计划，而非约束性国家能效下限。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨不實行歐盟式強制生態設計能效法規（無與法規（EU）2019/2020 直接對應者），即不以約束性最低光效（lm/W）、顯色性、壽命或功率因數下限作為 LED 燈的市場准入關卡。能效性能通過柬埔寨能效計劃與效率倡議（由能源主管部門推動，並得到 ASEAN SHINE 照明等 ASEAN 協調努力支持）處理，可能針對特定燈類別設定自願或基於計劃的最低能效標準（MEPS）及產品登記。性能在其他方面由 ISC 採用的 CS / IEC 性能標準（如自鎮流 LED 燈性能用 IEC 62612）及買方規範管理。據實映射：歐盟 ＂生態設計＂ 通道對應這些能效計劃，而非約束性國家能效下限。

standards_or_laws: No EU-style mandatory Ecodesign efficacy regulation in Cambodia (no direct counterpart to Regulation (EU) 2019/2020)
Cambodian energy programmes / efficiency initiatives and ASEAN harmonisation (e.g. ASEAN SHINE for lighting); CS / IEC 62612 performance standard where adopted

summary.en: China sets mandatory minimum energy performance and energy-efficiency grades for LED lamps through GB 30255 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED lamps for general lighting service) and related performance standards, with China Energy Label (CEL) registration for in-scope products. This is a binding domestic efficacy floor — more prescriptive than Cambodia's programme-based approach. The Chinese efficacy data and CEL registration provide a strong technical baseline that typically exceeds any voluntary Cambodian MEPS, but the CEL itself is a Chinese-domestic scheme not recognised in Cambodia.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB 30255（普通照明用 LED 灯能效限定值及能效等级）及相关性能标准为 LED 灯设定强制最低能效与能效等级，对范围内产品实行中国能效标识（CEL）登记。这是约束性国内能效下限——比柬埔寨基于计划的方式更具规定性。中国能效数据与 CEL 登记提供有力技术基线，通常超过任何自愿性柬埔寨 MEPS，但 CEL 本身为中国国内方案，柬埔寨不予认可。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB 30255（普通照明用 LED 燈能效限定值及能效等級）及相關性能標準為 LED 燈設定強制最低能效與能效等級，對範圍內產品實行中國能效標識（CEL）登記。這是約束性國內能效下限——比柬埔寨基於計劃的方式更具規定性。中國能效數據與 CEL 登記提供有力技術基線，通常超過任何自願性柬埔寨 MEPS，但 CEL 本身為中國國內方案，柬埔寨不予認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED lamps for general lighting service
China Energy Label (CEL) registration for in-scope LED products

gap.en: This is a case where the China baseline (mandatory GB 30255 efficacy floor + CEL) is more prescriptive than the target market. Cambodia has no binding national efficacy regulation as a market-access gate, so there is no EU-style Ecodesign conformity step to add; the EU 'Ecodesign' lane maps onto Cambodian energy programmes that may be voluntary or programme-based. Practical guidance: (1) confirm with the Cambodian energy authority and the importer whether any MEPS / programme registration applies to the specific lamp category and whether it is mandatory or voluntary; (2) existing GB 30255 efficacy data and IEC 62612 performance reports are strong supporting evidence and usually exceed any Cambodian programme threshold; (3) the China Energy Label is not recognised — do not present it as Cambodian compliance; (4) buyer/tender energy-performance specs may be the real driver and should be met directly.
gap.zh: 这是中国基线（强制 GB 30255 能效下限 + CEL）比目标市场更具规定性的情形。柬埔寨没有作为市场准入关卡的约束性国家能效法规，故无须新增欧盟式生态设计合格评定步骤；欧盟 ＂生态设计＂ 通道映射至可能为自愿或基于计划的柬埔寨能效计划。实务指引：（1）向柬埔寨能源主管部门及进口商确认是否有 MEPS / 计划登记适用于具体灯类别，以及为强制或自愿；（2）现有 GB 30255 能效数据与 IEC 62612 性能报告为有力支持证据，通常超过任何柬埔寨计划阈值；（3）中国能效标识不被认可——不要将其作为柬埔寨合规呈现；（4）买方/招标能效规范可能是真正驱动因素，应直接满足。
gap.zht: 這是中國基線（強制 GB 30255 能效下限 + CEL）比目標市場更具規定性的情形。柬埔寨沒有作為市場准入關卡的約束性國家能效法規，故無須新增歐盟式生態設計合格評定步驟；歐盟 ＂生態設計＂ 通道映射至可能為自願或基於計劃的柬埔寨能效計劃。實務指引：（1）向柬埔寨能源主管部門及進口商確認是否有 MEPS / 計劃登記適用於具體燈類別，以及為強制或自願；（2）現有 GB 30255 能效數據與 IEC 62612 性能報告為有力支持證據，通常超過任何柬埔寨計劃閾值；（3）中國能效標識不被認可——不要將其作為柬埔寨合規呈現；（4）買方/招標能效規範可能是真正驅動因素，應直接滿足。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style mandatory national efficacy gate — energy performance via Cambodian energy programmes (voluntary or programme-based MEPS) and CS / IEC 62612 where adopted; confirm scope with energy authority and importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 30255 minimum energy efficiency values and grades plus China Energy Label registration for in-scope LED lamps

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia has no EU-style mandatory Ecodesign efficacy regulation as a market-access gate for LED lamps; energy performance is addressed through Cambodian energy programmes (voluntary or programme-based MEPS) and CS / IEC 62612 performance where adopted, supported by ASEAN harmonisation. China's GB 30255 efficacy floor and China Energy Label are more prescriptive and provide strong technical evidence, but the CEL is not recognised in Cambodia. Confirm with the energy authority and importer whether any programme registration applies to the specific lamp category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨没有作为 LED 灯市场准入关卡的欧盟式强制生态设计能效法规；能效性能通过柬埔寨能效计划（自愿或基于计划的 MEPS）及（如采用）CS / IEC 62612 性能处理，并得到 ASEAN 协调支持。中国 GB 30255 能效下限与中国能效标识更具规定性并提供有力技术证据，但 CEL 在柬埔寨不被认可。应向能源主管部门及进口商确认是否有计划登记适用于具体灯类别。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨沒有作為 LED 燈市場准入關卡的歐盟式強制生態設計能效法規；能效性能通過柬埔寨能效計劃（自願或基於計劃的 MEPS）及（如採用）CS / IEC 62612 性能處理，並得到 ASEAN 協調支持。中國 GB 30255 能效下限與中國能效標識更具規定性並提供有力技術證據，但 CEL 在柬埔寨不被認可。應向能源主管部門及進口商確認是否有計劃登記適用於具體燈類別。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling & Product Registration (no EU-style A-G label or EPREL)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签与产品登记（无欧盟式 A-G 标签或 EPREL）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤與產品登記（無歐盟式 A-G 標籤或 EPREL）

summary.en: Cambodia does not require an EU-style rescaled A-G energy label or an EPREL-type public product database registration as a precondition for placing LED lamps on the market (no counterpart to Regulation (EU) 2019/2015 or the EPREL database). Where energy labelling exists, it is tied to specific Cambodian energy-programme initiatives or ASEAN harmonisation activities and applies to the categories those programmes cover, rather than as a universal mandatory label for all light sources. The in-country importer should confirm whether the specific lamp category is in scope of any Cambodian energy-label or registration programme and, if so, in what format and language (Khmer/English) the information must be presented.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨不要求以欧盟式重新分级的 A-G 能效标签或 EPREL 式公开产品数据库登记作为 LED 灯投放市场的前提条件（无与法规（EU）2019/2015 或 EPREL 数据库对应者）。当存在能效标签时，其与特定柬埔寨能效计划倡议或 ASEAN 协调活动挂钩，并适用于这些计划涵盖的类别，而非作为所有光源的普遍强制标签。在地进口商应确认具体灯类别是否属于任何柬埔寨能效标签或登记计划范围，若是，则信息须以何种格式与语言（高棉文/英文）呈现。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨不要求以歐盟式重新分級的 A-G 能效標籤或 EPREL 式公開產品數據庫登記作為 LED 燈投放市場的前提條件（無與法規（EU）2019/2015 或 EPREL 數據庫對應者）。當存在能效標籤時，其與特定柬埔寨能效計劃倡議或 ASEAN 協調活動掛鈎，並適用於這些計劃涵蓋的類別，而非作為所有光源的普遍強制標籤。在地進口商應確認具體燈類別是否屬於任何柬埔寨能效標籤或登記計劃範圍，若是，則信息須以何種格式與語言（高棉文/英文）呈現。

standards_or_laws: No EU-style energy label / EPREL registration mandate in Cambodia (no counterpart to Regulation (EU) 2019/2015)
Cambodian energy-programme labelling / registration where applicable; ASEAN harmonisation activities for lighting

summary.en: China requires the China Energy Label (CEL) for in-scope LED lamps under the national energy efficiency labelling scheme, with mandatory registration and a graded label displayed on the product/packaging, based on GB 30255 grades. This is a binding domestic labelling and registration obligation. The CEL grading and registration data give a Chinese exporter a ready evidence base, but the CEL is a Chinese-domestic mark and is neither required nor recognised in Cambodia.
summary.zh: 中国对范围内 LED 灯依国家能效标识制度要求中国能效标识（CEL），须强制登记并在产品/包装上展示基于 GB 30255 等级的分级标签。这是约束性国内标识与登记义务。CEL 分级与登记数据为中国出口商提供现成证据库，但 CEL 为中国国内标志，在柬埔寨既非必需亦不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國對範圍內 LED 燈依國家能效標識制度要求中國能效標識（CEL），須強制登記並在產品/包裝上展示基於 GB 30255 等級的分級標籤。這是約束性國內標識與登記義務。CEL 分級與登記數據為中國出口商提供現成證據庫，但 CEL 為中國國內標誌，在柬埔寨既非必需亦不被認可。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label (CEL) — mandatory energy efficiency labelling and registration for in-scope LED lamps
GB 30255 — basis for the energy efficiency grades shown on the CEL

gap.en: Again the China baseline (mandatory CEL + registration) exceeds the target market. Cambodia has no universal energy-label or EPREL-style registration mandate, so there is no EU-equivalent labelling/registration step to add for general market access; the obligation only arises if the specific lamp category falls under a Cambodian energy-programme label. Practical guidance: (1) confirm with the importer and energy authority whether the category is in any Cambodian labelling/registration programme and whether participation is mandatory; (2) do not reproduce the China Energy Label as Cambodian compliance — it is not recognised; (3) where a buyer/tender or programme requires energy data, the existing GB 30255 / CEL grades and IEC 62612 performance reports supply the underlying numbers; (4) confirm format and language (Khmer/English) for any required on-product energy information.
gap.zh: 中国基线（强制 CEL + 登记）再次超过目标市场。柬埔寨没有普遍能效标签或 EPREL 式登记强制，故一般市场准入无须新增欧盟式标签/登记步骤；义务仅在具体灯类别属于柬埔寨能效计划标签时产生。实务指引：（1）向进口商及能源主管部门确认该类别是否在任何柬埔寨标签/登记计划内及参与是否强制；（2）不要将中国能效标识复制为柬埔寨合规——其不被认可；（3）当买方/招标或计划要求能效数据时，现有 GB 30255 / CEL 等级及 IEC 62612 性能报告提供底层数据；（4）确认任何要求的产品上能效信息的格式与语言（高棉文/英文）。
gap.zht: 中國基線（強制 CEL + 登記）再次超過目標市場。柬埔寨沒有普遍能效標籤或 EPREL 式登記強制，故一般市場准入無須新增歐盟式標籤/登記步驟；義務僅在具體燈類別屬於柬埔寨能效計劃標籤時產生。實務指引：（1）向進口商及能源主管部門確認該類別是否在任何柬埔寨標籤/登記計劃內及參與是否強制；（2）不要將中國能效標識複製為柬埔寨合規——其不被認可；（3）當買方/招標或計劃要求能效數據時，現有 GB 30255 / CEL 等級及 IEC 62612 性能報告提供底層數據；（4）確認任何要求的產品上能效信息的格式與語言（高棉文/英文）。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style mandatory energy label or EPREL-type registration for general market access; labelling/registration only where a specific Cambodian energy programme covers the lamp category — confirm scope with importer and energy authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label and registration required for in-scope LED lamps based on GB 30255 grades

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia has no EU-style A-G energy label or EPREL-type registration mandate for general market access of LED lamps; any labelling/registration is tied to a specific Cambodian energy programme covering the category. China's mandatory China Energy Label and GB 30255-based registration exceed this and supply ready energy data, but the CEL is not recognised in Cambodia. Confirm with the importer and energy authority whether the lamp category is in scope of any Cambodian labelling/registration programme and the required format/language.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨没有针对 LED 灯一般市场准入的欧盟式 A-G 能效标签或 EPREL 式登记强制；任何标签/登记均与涵盖该类别的特定柬埔寨能效计划挂钩。中国强制的中国能效标识及基于 GB 30255 的登记超过此要求并提供现成能效数据，但 CEL 在柬埔寨不被认可。应向进口商及能源主管部门确认该灯类别是否属于任何柬埔寨标签/登记计划及所需格式/语言。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨沒有針對 LED 燈一般市場准入的歐盟式 A-G 能效標籤或 EPREL 式登記強制；任何標籤/登記均與涵蓋該類別的特定柬埔寨能效計劃掛鈎。中國強制的中國能效標識及基於 GB 30255 的登記超過此要求並提供現成能效數據，但 CEL 在柬埔寨不被認可。應向進口商及能源主管部門確認該燈類別是否屬於任何柬埔寨標籤/登記計劃及所需格式/語言。
